name: UWHARRIE CAPITAL CORP
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Uwharrie Capital Corp (the Company) is a North Carolina business corporation and registered bank holding company. The Company was incorporated on February 24, 1993 to become the bank holding company for Uwharrie Bank (the Bank), a North Carolina commercial bank, originally chartered on September 28, 1983 as Bank of Stanly, and its three wholly owned subsidiaries, The Strategic Alliance Corporation (Strategic Alliance), BOS Agency, Inc. (BOS Agency) and Gateway Mortgage,...
